creator: rtanveer@yahoo.com
text:
Hi, 

I was reviewing my dmesg and found some problem there.
I do not know if that is issue. Can you please help me
understand it?

I found that my irq 11 is being shared with my Ath0
and drm0. See below and I hope this help resolve my
problem.

ath0: <Atheros 5212> mem 0xef000000-0xef00ffff irq 11
at device 19.0 on pci0
-------------------
drm0: <ATI Radeon If R250 9000> port 0xd000-0xd0ff mem
0xe0000000-0xe3ffffff,0xed000000-0xed00ffff irq 11 at
device 0.0 on pci1

If that is problem. Please tell me how ot change irq
or manually adjust them? 

Thanks.

Tanveer.
